# CLKRelativeDateStyle.naturalAbbreviated

**Case**

An abbreviated, natural date style.

## Declaration

```swift
case naturalAbbreviated
```

## Discussion

The smallest possible abbreviation of the natural date style. For example, ten hours and nine minutes always formats as “10H 9M.” The [doc://com.apple.clockkit/documentation/ClockKit/CLKRelativeDateStyle/natural] style may provide a longer string like “10hrs 9min” if there’s enough space.

## Date Styles

- **CLKRelativeDateStyle.natural**: A natural date style.
- **CLKRelativeDateStyle.naturalFull**: A natural date style using unabbreviated units, when possible.
- **CLKRelativeDateStyle.offset**: An offset date style.
- **CLKRelativeDateStyle.offsetShort**: A short offset date style.
- **CLKRelativeDateStyle.timer**: A timer style.
